info.name: Facebook Business Manager Facebook Pages API
Pages
Facebook Business Manager Get page details

params.name: page_id
params.description: The ID of the Facebook Page

params.name: fields
params.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include in the response

items.docs: Retrieves information about a Facebook Page including name, category, description, fan count, and other metadata.

info.name: Facebook Business Manager Subscribe app to page

params.name: page_id
params.description: The ID of the Facebook Page

items.docs: Installs a Webhooks-configured app on the Page so the app can receive real-time updates about changes to the Page.

info.name: Posts
Facebook Business Manager Get page feed

params.name: page_id
params.description: The ID of the Facebook Page

params.name: fields
params.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include in the response

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of objects to return per page

params.name: after
params.description: Cursor for forward pagination

items.docs: Retrieves the feed of posts on a Facebook Page. Includes posts published by the page and posts by visitors if allowed.

info.name: Facebook Business Manager Create a page post

params.name: page_id
params.description: The ID of the Facebook Page

items.docs: Publishes a new post to the Facebook Page feed. Supports text posts, link shares, and scheduled posts. Requires a page access token with pages_manage_posts permission.

info.name: Facebook Business Manager Get a post

params.name: post_id
params.description: The ID of the post (format PAGE_ID_POST_ID)

params.name: fields
params.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include in the response

items.docs: Retrieves the details of a specific post including message, attachments, reactions, and engagement counts.

info.name: Facebook Business Manager Update a post

params.name: post_id
params.description: The ID of the post (format PAGE_ID_POST_ID)

items.docs: Updates an existing post on the Page. Only the message field can be updated after publishing.

info.name: Facebook Business Manager Delete a post

params.name: post_id
params.description: The ID of the post (format PAGE_ID_POST_ID)

items.docs: Deletes a post from the Facebook Page. This action cannot be undone.

info.name: Comments
Facebook Business Manager Get post comments

params.name: post_id
params.description: The ID of the post (format PAGE_ID_POST_ID)

params.name: fields
params.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include in the response

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of objects to return per page

params.name: after
params.description: Cursor for forward pagination

params.name: filter
params.description: Filter for comment type

params.name: order
params.description: Order of comments

items.docs: Retrieves comments on a specific post. Supports pagination and filtering by order.

info.name: Facebook Business Manager Create a comment

params.name: post_id
params.description: The ID of the post (format PAGE_ID_POST_ID)

items.docs: Posts a comment on a Page post as the Page. Requires a page access token with pages_manage_engagement permission.

info.name: Facebook Business Manager Delete a comment

params.name: comment_id
params.description: The ID of the comment to delete

items.docs: Deletes a comment from a Page post. The Page must own the comment or the post the comment is on.

info.name: Photos
Facebook Business Manager Upload a page photo

params.name: page_id
params.description: The ID of the Facebook Page

items.docs: Uploads a photo to the Facebook Page. Can be published directly or uploaded as unpublished for later use in posts.

info.name: Videos
Facebook Business Manager Upload a page video

params.name: page_id
params.description: The ID of the Facebook Page

items.docs: Uploads a video to the Facebook Page. Supports direct upload via URL or resumable upload for large files.

info.name: Page Insights
Facebook Business Manager Get page insights

params.name: page_id
params.description: The ID of the Facebook Page

params.name: metric
params.description: Comma-separated list of metrics to retrieve such as page_impressions, page_engaged_users, page_fans.

params.name: period
params.description: Aggregation period for the metrics

params.name: since
params.description: Start of the date range in Unix timestamp or YYYY-MM-DD format

params.name: until
params.description: End of the date range in Unix timestamp or YYYY-MM-DD format

items.docs: Retrieves analytics metrics for the Facebook Page including reach, impressions, engagement, and audience demographics.
